title: Tinker's Woodworks
description: Adds more variant of wood for your tinker's tools
body:
A datapack for modded wood variants for Tinker's Construct aside from vanilla wood.

Requires a _resource pack: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arizs-tinkering-resources](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arizs-tinkering-resources)_

Currently supports:
- Oh The Biomes You'll Go

I'll update this to add more as the time goes on.
